title: Credentials
subtitle: Manage the credentials the agent can use to log into sites.

vault.safeStorage: Vault: System secure storage (Keychain / DPAPI / libsecret)
vault.inMemory: Vault: In-memory only (system secure storage unavailable)
vault.inMemoryWarning: Credentials will be lost when Ola restarts. Restart the app after enabling your OS keyring.

list.title: My credentials
list.empty: No credentials yet. Add one below or enable a built-in template.

add.title: Add credential
add.passwordHelp: The password is sent to the OS keyring and never returned to the renderer.

edit.title: Edit credential · {{domain}}
edit.help: Click Save changes after editing. Leave the password blank to keep it unchanged.

browser.title: Login browser (live)
browser.openTitle: Open the selected domain's login page in the browser on the right
browser.noCredential: Enable a built-in template or add a credential before opening the browser.
browser.opened: Opened {{url}} in the browser on the right

dev.title: PR2-A acceptance helper (dev only)
dev.description: Seed a 6-step placeholder login run to check the status strip rendering.
dev.seeded: Sample run seeded. The browser panel on the right is active.

templates.title: Built-in site templates
templates.subtitle: 20 preconfigured selectors. Click Enable to fill in your username/password.

pass.title: Login verified
pass.description: The credential works. The agent can use it for automated logins.

challenge.title: Automation challenge detected
challenge.description: {{kind}} was detected on this site. The agent will pause and ask you to complete the challenge manually when needed.

approval.title: Approve credential use?
approval.description: The agent wants to log in to {{domain}} as {{username}}. Allow?
